title: Standing version-bracketed regression red-set (FW-C)
description: One entry per historical fix, each a shape proven RED on the released rolldown BEFORE the fix and GREEN AT/after it. Run by scripts/regression-redset.ts against both the red and green npm targets (a local PR snapshot for RED-0) so anything that ever broke twice can never silently break a third time. See .agents/docs/regression-red-set.md.

greenSnapshot.note: PR-10104 strict-order arc snapshot; the RED-0 green target. Override with REDSET_GREEN_SNAPSHOT.

entries.cluster: 1.2 wrapped-ESM init emission — cross-chunk init cycle
entries.title: cross-chunk init_* cycle (barrel/CJS)

provenance.fixCommit: no released main fix — GREEN only on final-snapshot-42628c18b (PR-10104 strict-order arc); still OPEN on npm 1.1.5
provenance.note: Generator shape buildCrossChunkInitCycle (src/generate.ts). Also the live-catch acceptance scripts/cross-chunk-init-cycle-catch.ts + .agents/evidence/9887-cross-chunk-init-cycle.json.

entries.cluster: 1.2 wrapped-ESM init emission — dangling init across chunks
entries.title: dangling wrapped-ESM init_shared

provenance.fixCommit: 63fbc96e1 fix: avoid dangling wrapped-ESM init call across chunks (#9502) (#9717)
6345ddf70 fix(deconflict): rename CJS-wrapped locals that shadow chunk-root bindings (#9921)
2d9f81cdd fix(chunk-optimizer): follow entry facade edges in runtime placement cycle check (#10101)

entries.cluster: chunking — manual codeSplitting cross-entry execution leak (seo:false)
entries.title: cross-entry execution leak without strictExecutionOrder

provenance.fixPr: OPEN — no fix released; #9997 fixed only the strictExecutionOrder:true path, the seo:false leak is still open
provenance.fixCommit: none — bracket-pending: the bug is RED on BOTH npm 1.1.5 AND the final-snapshot-42628c18b (open everywhere at seo:false), so there is no green target yet; the entry graduates to a normal bracket when a fix lands and the green target flips
provenance.note: The fuzzer-model translation of the issue's verified repro (buildCrossEntryLeakCase, src/generate.ts), caught by the reachability-isolation oracle the persisted seo:false axis selects. Live-catch acceptance: scripts/cross-entry-leak-catch.ts + .agents/evidence/9998-cross-entry-leak.json.

broaderShapeFoldedIn.summary: FW-B deliverable 4 investigated the W14c-residual 'broader automatic-chunking cross-entry leak' and folded it here — it is the SAME ROOT MECHANISM as #9998 (a co-locating organic group at seo:false runs a disjoint-reachability entry's top-level, caught by the reachability-isolation oracle), only a broader TRIGGER, so it is NOT a separate bracket.
broaderShapeFoldedIn.abLationCorrection: The W14c 'automatic chunking' characterization is DISPROVEN: automatic chunking does NOT leak (verified GREEN on both npm 1.1.5 and the snapshot; 0/28 random automatic multi-entry seo:false cases leaked). A co-locating organic group is load-bearing.
broaderShapeFoldedIn.broaderTrigger: The genuinely broader surface is PURELY STATIC (no dynamic import) and fires under a PLAIN organic group (not only entriesAware): two mutually-unreachable entries sharing a static module, each owning a private eager module; loading ONE entry runs the OTHER's private top-level (reachability-isolation:[le2-b,le2-pb]).
broaderShapeFoldedIn.campaign: scripts/broad-cross-entry-leak-catch.ts — isolation RED 20/20 on BOTH npm 1.1.5 AND the snapshot, seo:true control GREEN; evidence .agents/evidence/broad-cross-entry-leak.json
